boundary_evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the clarity lens.

Read the clarity lens skill at skills/review/lenses/clarity-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/scope-lens/evals/files/story-mixing-feature-and-refactor/ticket.md fully.

Apply the clarity lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
boundary_evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='clarity'. The reviewer produces no finding whose body alleges the ticket mixes two units of work, bundles unrelated concerns, or should be split into separate tickets — those are scope-lens concerns. Clarity evaluates ambiguity, contradictions, and unclear referents within the ticket as written. Any findings should address whether the requirements or acceptance criteria contain ambiguous phrasing, undefined terms, or internal contradictions.

boundary_evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the clarity lens.

Read the clarity lens skill at skills/review/lenses/clarity-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/dependency-lens/evals/files/vendor-dep-not-captured/ticket.md fully.

Apply the clarity lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
boundary_evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='clarity'. The reviewer produces no finding about missing external-vendor dependencies or about the Dependencies section stating 'None identified' — those are dependency-lens concerns. Clarity may flag whether the bug body or requirements contain ambiguous phrasing (e.g., unclear API version references or imprecise field names), but must not reason about the presence or absence of captured vendor couplings in the Dependencies section.
